meta.description: A mass event with public attendance such as a concert, festival, fair, sports event, religious event, congress, exposition, conference, convention, or inauguration. Extracted from news articles.

example.name: Clasico America vs Chivas
example.description: High-profile match between America and Chivas at Estadio Azteca, matchday 5 of Apertura 2025.
example.context: Special security operation coordinated between the Secretaria de Seguridad Ciudadana and Liga MX. Partial road closures expected near the venue.

date_range.mention: el proximo domingo 10 de agosto a las 6 de la tarde

event_type.description: Type of event from the catalogue. Choose the most specific category that matches.

event_subtype.description: A more specific subtype given the context. For example, if event_type is 'sports_event', the subtype could be 'soccer_match', 'baseball_game', etc.

status.description: Current status of the event as reported in the article.

name.description: Name of the event if it has one, or a descriptive name. For example: 'Clasico America vs Chivas', 'Cuarta Feria de la Fresa'. Null if no name can be determined.

description.description: Brief free-text description of the event.

tags.description: Keywords that describe the event, including names of participants, places, organizations, and relevant topics.

context.description: Free-text summary of the general context surrounding the event: security measures, related announcements, historical context, etc.

relevance.description: How relevant the event is within the article: 1 = main topic, 2 = mentioned secondarily, 3 = only implicitly mentioned.

date_range.description: Date or date range of the event. Extract the start and optionally end datetime. If only an approximate period is mentioned (e.g. 'late this year'), estimate a reasonable start date and set precision_days to reflect the uncertainty.

location.description: Location where the event takes place. Fill only fields explicitly mentioned in the text.

attendance.description: Estimated attendance or number of participants, if mentioned in the article.

venue_capacity.description: Capacity of the venue, if mentioned in the article.

price.description: Ticket price or price range for attendees, if mentioned. Set lower=0 and upper=0 if the event is free.

organizer.description: Name of the organizing entity, promoter, or responsible party, if mentioned.

performer.description: Name of the main performer, speaker, team, or featured participant, if applicable and mentioned.
